report_name: Cybersecurity Stocks Tumble as Fears Mount Over AI's Hacking Prowess

tools.name: Claude Mythos
tools.description: A highly capable AI model developed by Anthropic, withheld from public release due to its proficiency in identifying complex and previously unknown security vulnerabilities in major software products.

identities.name: Anthropic
identities.description: AI firm that developed the 'Claude Mythos' model and restricted its release due to its advanced vulnerability discovery capabilities, triggering a market selloff in the software and cybersecurity sector.

identities.name: Microsoft
identities.description: A technology partner of Anthropic granted access to the 'Claude Mythos' model for defensive research purposes.

identities.name: Palo Alto Networks
identities.description: A technology partner of Anthropic granted access to the 'Claude Mythos' model for defensive research purposes.

identities.name: Qualys
identities.description: Cybersecurity company whose stock value declined significantly following Anthropic's announcement about the 'Claude Mythos' AI model.
